title: StarBorn Origin
description: Feel the power of the stars passing through your veins...
body:
⭐ **Starborn Origin** ⭐

**Description**: Born under the signs of the stars, you emit the power of a star, illuminating the path and incinerating enemies with cosmic fire.

✅ **Positive powers**:
- Gravity: Those born under the starlight possess a natural affinity for the skies.
- It's barely 50k Kelvin outside: You can resist the heat temporally given your origins, but your body is still a faint star...
- Starblaze: You can incinerate all enemies in a 15-block radius at the cost of 5 hearts.
- Supernova: Your power allows you to create a  Supernova-like explosion in a medium range. It consumes 20 xp levels.

✴️ **Neutral powers**:
- More exhausion: Extra exhaustion from large appetite.

⛔ **Negative powers**:
- Hydrophobia: Water damages you, this is because of the energy you dissolve.


This is my first custom origin, so there may be some bugs or it may even be unbalanced :'3

You need the Origins and the Origins Extra Keybings mod in order to use this origin.
